home.title: HydroAccess AI
home.subtitle: Practical clean water recommendations for households, clinics, schools, and community teams working under real constraints.
home.mission: Our mission is to help underserved communities identify affordable, buildable, and safer routes to drinking water and sanitation.
home.stat1: 2.2B people lack safely managed drinking water.
home.stat3: Local context changes the best engineering choice.

how.title: Three steps from context to action
how.body: Each step keeps the recommendation connected to verifiable data, local constraints, and clear safety warnings.

advisor.title: Water Advisor
advisor.subtitle: Answer the essentials or describe your situation. HydroAccess AI selects from structured engineering solutions and explains the fit.
advisor.validationError: Review the required fields before generating the recommendation.
advisor.chatWelcome: Ask HydroAccess AI about clean water, contamination, filtration, storage, sanitation, hygiene, or practical water access.
advisor.chatPlaceholder: Ask a water or sanitation question...
advisor.chatError: I could not respond right now. Please try again.
advisor.chatScope: HydroAccess AI only answers questions about water, sanitation, hygiene, contamination, treatment, storage, and safe-water access.
chatExamples: Is cloudy water safe to drink?

about.title: Built for engineering judgment in constrained settings
about.body: HydroAccess AI was inspired by the teams who make water safer with limited budgets, difficult terrain, unreliable infrastructure, and urgent health needs. The platform combines structured engineering knowledge with multilingual AI explanation so communities can move from uncertainty to an actionable first plan.

footer.creator: Created and developed by Angel Hernandez.
footer.disclaimer: HydroAccess AI provides educational guidance and should be used with local testing, public-health guidance, and qualified engineering judgment.

reasons.settlement-match: Fits the urban or rural setting.
